zh.lifeSummary: 當John Le Mason於1302年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾阿爾維勒時，他的父親Sir John De la Lee League of PinHill16歲，母親Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell21歲。他於1319年與Christine Decharnes在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1385年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾貝林頓享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾阿爾維勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Le Mason于1302年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾阿爾維勒时，他的父亲Sir John De la Lee League of PinHill16岁，母亲Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell21岁。他于1319年与Christine Decharnes在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1385年在英国英格兰史洛普爾貝林頓享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾阿爾維勒。

nameMeanings.name: Mason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English masoun ‘mason, stone worker, builder in stone’ (Old Central French maçon, masson). A Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun) gives rise to Machin and its variants. See also Mayson . Stonemasonry was a hugely important craft in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Masson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Lucien, Alain, Henri, Pierre, Yves, Agathe, Aime, Cecile, Clovis, Francois, Francoise.

variants.name: Machin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Juan, Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Blanca, Diego, Luis, Ramon.
English: variant of   Machen  . This is the more common form of the name in Britain and Ireland.
Spanish (Machín): probably a nickname from machín ‘boor, lout’, often applied to a blacksmith's apprentice.

variants.name: Macon
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places so called, e.g. in Saône-et-Loire.
French: from the old oblique form of the ancient Germanic personal name Mako, a variant of Mago, a short form of compound names formed with maht ‘strength, power’ as the first element.
French (Maçon): occupational name for a mason, (Old) French maçon.

variants.name: Machen
meanings: English: variant of Mason , from the Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Le Mason was born in 1302, in Alveley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John De la Lee League of PinHill, was 16 and his mother, Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell, was 21. He married Christine Decharnes in 1319, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1385, in Berrington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in Alveley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Le Mason est né en 1302, à Alveley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John De la Lee League of PinHill, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Christine Decharnes en 1319, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1385, à Berrington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Alveley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Le Mason 1302 in Alveley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John De la Lee League of PinHill 16 und seine Mutter Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell 21. Er hat 1319 in Shropshire, England Christine Decharnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1385 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Berrington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Alveley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Le Mason è nato il nel 1302 nel Alveley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John De la Lee League of PinHill, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Christine Decharnes nel 1319, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1385, nel Berrington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Alveley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Le Masonが1302年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアアルベリーで生まれた時，父Sir John De la Lee League of PinHillは16歳，母Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwellは21歳であった。1319年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでChristine Decharnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1385年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアバーリントンで83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアアルベリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Le Mason(이)가 1302년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 앨벨리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John De la Lee League of PinHill(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1319년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Christine Decharnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 베링턴에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 앨벨리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Le Mason nasceu em 1302, em Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John De la Lee League of PinHill, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Christine Decharnes em 1319, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1385, em Berrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Le Mason родился в 1302 г. в местности алвели, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John De la Lee League of PinHill было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Christine Decharnes в 1319 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1385 г. в местности биррингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности алвели, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Le Mason nació en 1302, en Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John De la Lee League of PinHill, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Christine Decharnes en 1319, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1385, en Berrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
